name: CodeQL Security Scanning + Dependabot
description: Set up GitHub CodeQL for static security analysis and Dependabot for dependency vulnerability scanning. CodeQL finds XSS, SQL injection, and path traversal in your code. Dependabot auto-PRs vulnerable dependency updates.

steps.description: Create CodeQL analysis workflow on push/PR: javascript and typescript languages
Configure Dependabot: npm updates weekly, GitHub Actions updates monthly
Add npm audit --audit-level=high to CI — fail build on high-severity vulnerabilities
Create security policy: responsible disclosure, contact email, expected response time
Run initial audit to baseline current vulnerability state
